title: Author AisleDetailViewModel
description: Create the view model for a single aisle's detail screen — the page that shows every product inside one aisle with a working toolbar and layout toggle. One view model serves every aisle; the aisle key is passed in at construction.

context.screen_purpose: When the visitor taps an aisle (e.g. 'Collections'), they see a header for that aisle and a collection section listing every widget in it. The toolbar works the same way it does on the shop home, but it operates on the products of a single aisle.
context.construction: The view model takes an aisleKey at construction so it can ask ShowcaseCatalogService.byAisle(aisleKey) for its product list. It does not know about other aisles.
context.shared_patterns_with_shop_home: Search / sort / layout toggle behaviour mirrors shop home — but sort by aisle makes no sense here (only one aisle present), so the sort modes are name ascending/descending only.

goals: AisleDetailViewModel extends TBaseViewModel and lives under example/lib/showcase/feature/aisle_detail/views/aisle_detail/.
Constructor takes aisleKey, ShowcaseCatalogService, and MockContentService.
Exposes read-only cells for searchQuery, sortMode, layout.
Derives the filtered/sorted product list from the cells and the catalog service.
Exposes an empty-state observable when filters produce zero results.
Opens a product by emitting a callback — does not navigate directly.
acceptance_criteria: Constructing with aisleKey='navigation' exposes exactly the navigation aisle's products.
Search, sort, and layout toggles behave identically to shop home's equivalents.
Empty search result exposes the empty observable as true.
Swapping aisleKey (by constructing a new instance) yields a fully independent view model with no leaked state.
constraints: Follow the same conventions as shop home view model (mvvm, views-and-view-models, state).
Do not subclass ShopHomeViewModel — favour composition of shared pure filter utilities if any logic is genuinely shareable; otherwise keep independent.
aisleKey is final and cannot change after construction.
tools_to_use: RepoPrompt MCP to check the shop home view model for shared patterns.

testing_and_verification.unit_tests: Verify: filter/sort/layout pipeline on the aisle's products, empty-state observable flips on impossible search, construction with different aisle keys yields independent instances. No mocks — use a real catalog fixture. Gherkin structure. Outcome-focused.

quality_checklist.maintainability: Adding a new aisle only requires adding entries to the catalog — the view model needs no changes.
quality_checklist.dry: Filter/sort logic is not duplicated from shop home verbatim. If shared, extract a pure helper into core/utils/.
quality_checklist.single_responsibility: One view model, one aisle's state at a time.
quality_checklist.performance: Derivation is O(n) over the aisle's products, not the full catalog.

worklog.summary: Created AisleDetailViewModel with derived product list scoped to a single aisle, toolbar-driven search/sort/layout, and full Gherkin-style test coverage.
changes: Created showcase/feature/aisle_detail/views/aisle_detail/aisle_detail_view_model.dart: TBaseViewModel<void> with final aisleKey, TNotifier<String> searchQuery, TNotifier<String?> sortValue, TNotifier<TCollectionSectionLayout> layout
Derived getter products: search by name/tagline (case-insensitive) → sort by Name A–Z or Name Z–A, scoped to byAisle(aisleKey)
Static sort option constants: sortByNameAsc, sortByNameDesc, sortOptions
Mutators: updateSearchQuery, updateSortValue, updateLayout, selectProduct (delegates to callback)
No GetIt registration — callback parameter makes factory registration awkward; view constructs inline

Created test/showcase/feature/aisle_detail/views/aisle_detail/aisle_detail_view_model_test.dart: 30 Gherkin-style tests covering search, sort, layout, empty state, combined search+sort, product selection, reactive notifications, independent instances

workflow_instructions: Done: mark `done`, append `worklog`, move to archive.
Add `follow_up_notes` to 13-author-aisle-detail-view-task with the public surface.
